---
title: "Projects"
toc: false
---

This page highlights current AD-Genomics-Cardiff workstreams. Specific project
names, datasets, and outputs can be added as they are ready to share publicly.

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card}
### Integrative genetics workstream

**Focus:** Connecting Alzheimer’s disease risk loci to downstream biological
mechanisms using genetic and multi-omics data.

**Current activity:** Placeholder summary for cohort integration, statistical
analysis, and interpretation work led by the team.

**Methods:** GWAS, polygenic risk modelling, pathway analysis, and functional follow-up.

**Evidence:**
- Placeholder project page or repository link
- Placeholder report, preprint, or poster link
- Placeholder dataset or methods resource
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card}
### Sequencing and variant interpretation workstream

**Focus:** Using long-read sequencing and variant-calling workflows to improve
resolution of Alzheimer’s disease-relevant genomic variation.

**Current activity:** Placeholder summary for pipeline development, benchmarking,
quality control, and biological interpretation.

**Methods:** Long-read sequencing, variant calling, annotation, and comparative analyses.

**Evidence:**
- Placeholder workflow or code repository link
- Placeholder benchmark, manuscript, or presentation link
- Placeholder documentation or resource link
:::
:::
:::
